title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Q2 Earnings Beat, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal second-quarter results reflect benefits from solid momentum across transportation and industrial solutions.

title: TE Connectivity Ltd. (TEL) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: TE Connectivity Ltd. (TEL) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript.

title: TE Connectivity (TEL) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: TE Connectivity (TEL) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.65 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.57 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.81 per share a year ago.

title: TE Connectivity Delivers Better-Than-Expected Results
text: TE reported adjusted fiscal second-quarter earnings per share of $1.65 from $4.2 billion in sales.

title: What's in the Cards for TE Connectivity (TEL) in Q2 Earnings?
text: TE Connectivity's (TEL) fiscal second-quarter results are expected to reflect strength in the Industrial segment. However, weak Communication and Transportation segments might have been concerns.

title: TE Connectivity to report second quarter financial results on April 26, 2023
text: SCHAFFHAUSEN, Switzerland , April 5, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- TE Connectivity Ltd. (NYSE: TEL) will report financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2023 before trading begins on April 26, 2023.
